overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Grand Theft Auto III showing a character walking through an urban Chinatown district at night. The character proceeds along a sidewalk past parked vans and a moving delivery truck before stopping at a street corner to observe traffic and pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with parked commercial vehicles

events.description: pedestrian in purple jacket walks past the character on the right
character passes second light blue van parked along the curb

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily down the sidewalk past parked vans and street lights

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in purple jacket and green pants walking toward the character

entered.detail: light blue commercial van parked along the street curb
building wall covered in large colorful graffiti tags and bubble letters
tall metal street light pole illuminating the sidewalk
multi-story urban building with illuminated signage

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a city sidewalk at night, passing parked blue vans on the left and a graffiti-covered building on the right. Street lights cast an artificial glow over the scene as pedestrians walk toward the camera.

events.description: large black delivery truck drives past on the left side of the character
character slows slightly while approaching the street corner

agents.ego_description: character continues walking past a large delivery truck and approaches the intersection corner

notable_agents.action: large black box truck with 'Belly-Up Fish and Seafood Processing' branding driving past

entered.detail: large black delivery truck with white text branding on the side
white painted zebra crossing markings on the asphalt
yellow traffic signal suspended over the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character walks past a large black delivery truck on the left while approaching a street intersection. Crosswalk markings become visible on the road ahead as the character nears the corner.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with pedestrian crossing and Chinese commercial storefronts

events.description: character stops walking and stands still at the street corner
camera rotates around the character to show different angles of the intersection
red sports car drives through the intersection from left to right

agents.ego_description: character stops at the corner and stands still while the camera rotates to observe surroundings, watching pedestrians and traffic

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket carrying a bag crossing the street
red sports car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: yellow pedestrian crossing signal box showing illuminated walk symbol
building facade with large red Chinese character signage
red classic sports car with headlights on driving through intersection

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the street corner where the camera pans around to reveal the intersection. Pedestrians in yellow jackets cross the street while a red sports car drives through. Chinese restaurant signage is visible across the street, and a pedestrian signal shows the walk symbol.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a nighttime city sidewalk that culminates in a wide view of a bustling urban intersection. It begins with the character walking past parked blue vans and a graffiti-covered building under the artificial glow of street lights. As the character proceeds, the camera passes a large black delivery truck on the left while the road ahead opens up to reveal white crosswalk markings. The scene then shifts as the character stops at the street corner, where the camera pans to reveal a red sports car and pedestrians in yellow jackets crossing the street. Finally, the view expands to show Chinese restaurant signage and a lit pedestrian signal across the intersection.
